summary: Comprehensive testing of Warehouse Inventory Management System completed. Backend APIs show 96.6% success rate (28/29 tests passed). Frontend UI and integration testing successful with all major workflows functional.

minor_bugs.issue: CSV export endpoint returns empty response

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with stats cards (7 materials, 100 total stock, 109 bins, 6 low stock alerts)
Material Master CRUD - create, view, edit materials working
GRN creation and completion workflow functional
Label generation with QR and barcode working
Reports page with CSV/Excel/PDF export buttons visible
Sidebar navigation works for all modules (Materials, GRN, Bins, Labels, Reports, Users)
Logout functionality working via user dropdown
Excel and PDF export endpoints working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix CSV export endpoint issue - currently returns empty response instead of CSV data
